calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH LLC's Motion To Transfer Action is off calendar. Insufficient service per CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing, and an additional 5 calendar days for service by mail. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
